zh.lifeSummary: 當John Butler於1459年8月24日出生在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東時，他的父親John Boteler24歲，母親Elizabeth Willoughby41歲。他於1475年與Lady Constance DeVere, Countess of Wollaton在英國英格蘭賀福爾沃爾頓結婚。他去世於1514年5月11日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Butler was born on 24 August 1459, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John Boteler, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Willoughby, was 41. He married Lady Constance DeVere, Countess of Wollaton in 1475, in Walton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 11 May 1514, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: John Butler(이)가 1459년 8월 24일 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Boteler(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Willoughby(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 월턴에서 Lady Constance DeVere, Countess of Wollaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1514년 5월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Butler родился 24 августа 1459 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Boteler было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Willoughby, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Constance DeVere, Countess of Wollaton в 1475 г. в местности валтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 11 мая 1514 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
